title: Frontend: Create API service layer (crediproApi.ts)
acceptance_criteria: requestLoan(payload) calls POST /api/loan/request with loanAmount, poolAddress, defaultTermDays
oracleVote(loanId, memberId) calls POST /api/oracle/vote with loanId and oracleMemberId
All functions return typed Promise responses matching backend response shapes
Includes hardcoded auth token 'mvp-demo-token' in Authorization header
